arguments.task: Research Zoho CRM using official and first-party sources. Open and extract evidence from official developer docs and first-party pages for: 1) API overview and whether APIs are REST or GraphQL, 2) authentication methods supported for Zoho CRM APIs, 3) any pricing or access requirements for API usage, 4) API rate limits or credits, 5) any official MCP server/docs or GitHub MCP registry presence if available from first-party or official registry pages. Prioritize pages on zoho.com and official GitHub/MCP registry pages. Return the exact page URLs and concise evidence snippets for each finding.

raw_result.description: Customer relationship management platform for sales automation, customer data, and pipeline workflows.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official Zoho CRM API v6 docs state the API uses OAuth 2.0; evidence gathered did not verify any other public auth method for CRM API access.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official API limits page includes a Free Edition with 5,000 API credits, indicating self-serve API access is available without sales gating.

api_surface.breadth: Official developer docs show broad CRM API coverage including RESTful Entity APIs for CRUD operations and a documented GraphQL API surface in API v6.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official MCP Registry search showed community-contributed Zoho CRM servers, but no first-party Zoho MCP server was verified from the gathered evidence.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Zoho CRM API uses a credit-based rolling 24-hour window by edition. Gathered evidence indicates Free Edition has 5,000 credits; higher editions scale credits by user count. Simultaneous call limits range from 5 to 25 depending on edition, with a fixed sub-concurrency limit of 10 for some heavy operations.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs indicate both REST and GraphQL support, OAuth 2.0 with refresh tokens, and purchasable extra API credits via API Dashboard. Official MCP Registry contains community Zoho CRM MCP entries, suggesting ecosystem support even without verified first-party MCP.
raw_result.human_review_reason: MCP availability is only verified via registry search results and appears community-maintained rather than first-party; also access-tier interpretation assumes Free Edition API availability from the limits page without independently confirming all signup prerequisites.

result.description: Customer relationship management platform for sales automation, customer data, and pipeline workflows.
